data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Fix implemented. Root cause: bash runner used its own START_TIME from _bash_runner_run() instead of the global _SCRIPT_ENTRY_TIME from script entry. Startup overhead (state parsing, test discovery, path canonicalization for 227+ files) was not accounted for in the time budget. Fix: (1) added _SCRIPT_ENTRY_TIME at script entry, (2) bash runner now uses _SCRIPT_ENTRY_TIME for elapsed calculations, (3) added process group kill for orphan cleanup.
